title: TrafficSignal
description: A traffic-control signal or pedestrian signal at an intersection. NYC Open Data has no single 'all traffic signals' dataset; this schema reconciles the signal-location datasets DOT does publish — Accessible Pedestrian Signal Locations (de3m-c5p4, 22c), Exclusive Pedestrian (Barnes Dance) Signals (8kuj-2n3u), and Leading Pedestrian Interval Signals — plus the intake represented by Traffic Signal & All-Way Stop Study Requests (w76s-c5u4). Keyed on an intersection location.

related: https://data.cityofnewyork.us/d/w76s-c5u4 (Traffic Signal & All-Way Stop Study Requests)

signalId.description: Signal / feature identifier (OBJECTID or DOT signal id where published).

location.description: Intersection description (Location), e.g. 'Broadway and W 42 St'.

statePlane.description: NY State Plane (EPSG:2263) coordinates as published (POINT_X / POINT_Y).
